vocab.meaning: cơ sở hạ tầng dân sự/công cộng
vocab.example: Expanding civic infrastructure, such as libraries and community centers, is essential for a high quality of life.

vocab.meaning: nơi toàn bê tông cốt thép (thành phố thiếu cây xanh)
vocab.example: My neighborhood is becoming a bit of a concrete jungle, so some open plazas would be a breath of fresh air.
I'd advocate for multifunctional spaces that can host morning markets as well as evening art exhibitions.

vocab.meaning: lá phổi xanh (khu vực nhiều cây xanh trong thành phố)
vocab.example: Adding a large park would act as a green lung, helping to purify the air in this industrial district.

vocab.meaning: trong khoảng cách có thể đi bộ được
vocab.example: It would be incredibly convenient to have more recreational facilities within walking distance of my house.

vocab.meaning: vẻ đẹp về mặt thẩm mỹ
vocab.example: Public fountains and well-designed benches would significantly enhance the aesthetic appeal of the local area.

vocab.meaning: sân chơi hòa nhập (cho mọi trẻ em, kể cả trẻ khuyết tật)
vocab.example: The community would benefit greatly from an inclusive playground where children of all abilities can play together.

vocab.meaning: trung tâm/điểm nóng hoạt động xã hội
vocab.example: A new public square could serve as a social hub, encouraging neighbors to interact more frequently.

vocab.meaning: sự bền vững về môi trường
vocab.example: Integrating more parks aligns with the city's goals for environmental sustainability and biodiversity.

vocab.meaning: ốc đảo giữa lòng đô thị
vocab.example: I believe every residential block deserves a small urban oasis to help people escape the stress of city life.
